basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad has released the official notification for 1 ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or in allied fields (GATE qualified), M.Tech in Thermofluidic Sciences or allied fields (desirable), Prior experience of microfluidics experiments or multiphase flow simulations using OpenFOAM (desirable)
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or in allied fields. Candidate must be GATE qualified. Candidates awaiting their result for M.Tech. (must be GATE qualified) degree are also eligible to apply. Prior experience of microfluidics experiments or multiphase flow simulations using OpenFOAM is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- for the first 2 years and Rs. 42000/- pm for the 3rd year.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering or allied fields and be GATE qualified. An M.Tech in Thermofluidic Sciences or allied fields is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT (ISM) Dhanbad offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT (ISM) Dhanbad offers age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per the rules and regulations of the Government of India.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ARG/2025/000835.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
